creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 244869
Garbage on screen after wakeup from suspend-to-RAM

Addendum: when I load nvidia-dri and friends from rc.conf instead of loader.conf, the screen doesn't stay black.  But now, consoles show random garbage and some times do not react to input anymore.  This effect persists.  If I get an X server going it's fine, but switching back to the console, I see garbage (see attached pic).
